_comment: Typed accounting event for LP_OPEN. position_reference shape per PRD §Position Reference Shape (multi-position-tracking.md line 501). source='receipt' (Day-1 mode, parser-derived; flips to 'registry' post-cutover per PRD line 515-518). primitive and accounting_category come from record_for('LP_OPEN'). physical_identity_hash MUST be byte-identical to the matching expected_registry_row.json's value. Payload field names match LPOpenEventPayload in almanak/framework/accounting/payload_schemas.py — keeping the goldens validatable against the production Pydantic model is load-bearing for T11/T12. Non-canonical UniV3 identity bag (token_id, current_tick) sits inside the registry row's payload, NOT inside the typed accounting payload.
